utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items requested in the final format: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), total_budget (complete cost breakdown). All 7 appear in the final package. Now check each for completeness: 1) destination: specified as Prague, Czech Republic — complete. 2) travel_dates: specified as September 9-13, 2024 — complete and matches 5 days. 3) transportation: flight details with costs — includes type, cost (€200 round trip), and timing details (approximate times but reasonably specific). Considered sufficiently specified with cost. 4) accommodation: hotel selection with costs — hotel_name provided (Tranquil Inn), location description, and cost (€400 for 4 nights). No exact address or booking ref required by format; considered complete. 5) activities: selected activities with costs — three activities listed with individual costs — complete. 6) additional_services: present but empty array; since the format asks for any extras with costs, having none is acceptable; item is present. 7) total_budget: complete cost breakdown — includes flights_accommodation subtotal, estimated activities total, estimated dining range, overall estimated total — complete. Thus, all 7 items are included and sufficiently specified.
